title: New Implementation
text: New Implementation Add new implementation for this component A component cannot have both Uniface and operating system implementations at the same time. However, a component with a Uniface or operating system implementation can also have one or more of the other non-Uniface implementations. You cannot create a Uniface implementation if the component name exceeds 16 bytes. Fields Type Option: Copy Description and Comments How to Define a Component Signature Related Links Component Implementations The component signature specifies the implementation a component, which determines the technology used to deploy it, such as Uniface, C, or Java.
